text:
/ci1 2 な、なんなのこれ……！
これ、本当に人間の動きなの！？

/ci1 2 ぼーっとしてんじゃねえよヒツギ！
一瞬でも気を抜いたら、死ぬぞ！

/ci1 2 What IS this thing!? Can a human really
move like this!?

/ci1 2 Don't just stand there, Hitsugi! If you
don't stay completely alert, you're dead!

な、なんなのこれ……！
これ、本当に人間の動きなの！？

ぼーっとしてんじゃねえよヒツギ！
一瞬でも気を抜いたら、死ぬぞ！

What IS this thing!? Can a human really move
like this!?

Don't just stand there, Hitsugi! If you don't
stay completely alert, you're dead!
